Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier

All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,Integer>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,Integer>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,Integer>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,Integer>
All Known Implementing Classes:
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl
public interface BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier extends ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,Integer>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,Integer>
Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().

  • Method Details

    • isZero

      @Deprecated BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier isZero()
      Deprecated.
      the actual value is always positive
      Ensures that the actual value is zero. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Specified by:
      isZero in interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,Integer>
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

      @Deprecated BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier isNotZero()

      Returns:
